name: pufferdesk
description: Turn your WordPress admin into a desktop.

scripts.check: npm run check:php && npm run check:js && npm run lint:css && npm run test:php && npm run test:security && npm run build && npm run check:dist
scripts.check:js: npm run check:js:syntax && npm run lint:js
scripts.check:js:syntax: find assets/js scripts tests \( -name '*.js' -o -name '*.mjs' \) -print0 | xargs -0 -n1 node --check
scripts.check:php: composer run lint:php:syntax && composer run lint:php
scripts.i18n:make-pot: mkdir -p languages && wp i18n make-pot . languages/pufferdesk.pot --domain=pufferdesk --exclude=.github,node_modules,vendor,release,assets/dist,scripts,tests
scripts.package: npm run build && node scripts/package-plugin.mjs && npm run check:package
